body:
## Rationale

Shannon Larkin has an active CTR gap (pos 4.8 / 13 impr / 0 clicks, logged in learned-patterns.md and tracked since 2026-06-27 L1 snapshot via #2927). CEO filed #2927 (Shannon Larkin title/meta fix) but content depth is the core lever.

The Godsmack arc is almost complete but missing the most recent album:

| Album | Status |
|---|---|
| Faceless (2003) | ✅ in DB |
| IV (2006) | ✅ in DB |
| The Oracle (2010) | ✅ in DB |
| 1000hp (2014) | 🔄 #2896 in proposals |
| When Legends Rise (2018) | ✅ in DB |
| **Lighting Up the Sky (2023)** | ❌ MISSING |

'Lighting Up the Sky' is Godsmack's most recent album — closing the arc to present creates the "What is Godsmack's newest album?" LLM capture, deepens the Shannon entity cluster, and supports CTR recovery.

- #1 US rock radio album cycle
- Shannon's most recent kit (Ludwig Vistalite revival era — distinct from prior Ludwig Classic Maple kits)
- Internal links: When Legends Rise → Lighting Up the Sky arc close

**Verified NOT in DB** (186 slugs checked 2026-06-27). **Verified NOT in any open seo-proposal.**

## Files to touch

- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add:
```js
{
  slug: 'lighting-up-the-sky-drum-setup',
  drummer: 'shannon-larkin',
  album: 'Lighting Up the Sky',
  artist: 'Godsmack',
  year: 2023,
  relatedAlbums: ['when-legends-rise-drum-setup', 'shannon-larkin-drum-setup'],
}
```
- `/public/llms/articles/lighting-up-the-sky-drum-setup.md`

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words prose
- ≥3 internal links (when-legends-rise article + shannon-larkin drummer profile + gear page)
- FAQPage schema: min 3 Q&A ("What kit does Shannon Larkin use on Lighting Up the Sky?", "What cymbals did Godsmack use in 2023?", "When was Godsmack's last album released?")
- Person + MusicAlbum schema
- Note Ludwig Vistalite kit if Shannon used it on this cycle

## Estimated organic uplift

Primary target: "godsmack lighting up the sky drum setup", "shannon larkin drum kit 2023". Feeds into Shannon CTR gap recovery already being tracked via #2927. Zero competitors for this specific album query.

## Verify

1. Slug `lighting-up-the-sky-drum-setup` present in `albumArticles.js`
2. `/articles/lighting-up-the-sky-drum-setup` returns 200 OK
3. LLM file exists at `/public/llms/articles/lighting-up-the-sky-drum-setup.md`
4. Article links to `/drummer/shannon-larkin`
5. FAQPage schema in Rich Results Test

## Done

- [ ] `lighting-up-the-sky-drum-setup` article live
- [ ] LLM file at `/public/llms/articles/lighting-up-the-sky-drum-setup.md`
title: SEO: Godsmack 'Lighting Up the Sky' drum setup article (Shannon Larkin, 2023 — closes Godsmack arc to present, active CTR gap drummer)
